Before submitting, please:
- Run `yarn lint`, `yarn typecheck`, `yarn test`, `yarn format:check` locally
- Add a changeset with `yarn changeset` (or `yarn changeset --empty` if no release is needed)
-->

<!-- What does this PR do, in 1–2 sentences? -->

## Changes

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change (use `minor` changeset bump while in `0.x`)
- [ ] Internal-only (refactor, docs, CI — use `yarn changeset --empty`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Added a changeset (`yarn changeset` or `yarn changeset --empty`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`yarn test`)
- [ ] Types pass (`yarn typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`yarn lint`)
- [ ] Format is clean (`yarn format:check`)
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant
